---
title: "Desktop AI + Teaching Applications"
subtitle: "AI Bootcamp — Session 1"
author: Erkmen Aslim
date: 2026-04-22
format:
  revealjs: default
  beamer: default
---

# Desktop App Demo

## Desktop AI tools

<!-- Erkmen: replace this slide -->

- ChatGPT / Claude desktop interface
- When to use chat vs. terminal
- Quick demo

# Teaching Application

## AI for teaching tasks

<!-- Erkmen: replace this slide -->

- Creating assignment prompts
- Building grading rubrics
- Iterating on rubric criteria
